signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire, confirmed today (April 22, 2026), has removed the Hormuz geopolitical risk premium, driving a broad crypto rally with Bitcoin topping $77K (up 2.2%), Ethereum up 0.7% to $2,390, and XRP up 1.5% to $1.45[1].
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?

signals.headline: Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Strategy Discloses $2.54B Bitcoin Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Strategy announced a $2.54 billion BTC buy today, lifting its holdings past 815,000 coins and absorbing three times April's global miner supply, forcing shorts to unwind above $76K and boosting Ethereum and XRP in the risk-on sentiment[1].
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET
